name: Minimum Cost of Ropes
description: Given an array of rope lengths, connect all ropes into one rope. The cost of connecting two ropes is the sum of their lengths. Return the minimum total cost to connect all ropes. You should always connect the two smallest ropes first (greedy approach using a min-heap).

examples.output: 29 (connect 2+3=5 cost 5, connect 4+5=9 cost 9, connect 6+9=15 cost 15, total=29)
